title: RamseyOS Dashboard View
description: Configuration for the Today Dashboard layout. Defines which widgets appear, their order, and their display preferences. One document per user (single-user system, so effectively a singleton).

id.description: Document ID. Typically 'default' for the single-user system.

widgets.description: Ordered list of widget configurations. Order determines display sequence top-to-bottom.

enabled.description: Whether this widget is visible on the dashboard.

collapsed.description: Whether the widget starts in collapsed state.

column.description: Layout column. Full-width or left/right for side-by-side sections.

eveningReviewTime.description: Time after which the evening review prompt appears (HH:MM, 24-hour).

morningBriefingTime.description: Target time for future mobile morning briefing push (HH:MM, 24-hour).

maxApprovalsShown.description: Number of approval items to show in the compact widget.

maxProjectsShown.description: Number of active projects to show in the pulse widget.
